name: Hwei, Brooding Painter
text: When I move, draw 1, then discard 1. Then, do the following based on the discarded card's type:Spell — Draw 1.Gear — Ready up to 2 runes.Unit — Give me +3 :rb_might: this turn.
text_rich:
When I move, draw 1, then discard 1. Then, do the following based on the discarded card's type:

  • Spell — Draw 1.
  • Gear — Ready up to 2 runes.
  • Unit — Give me +3 :rb_might: this turn.
accessibility_text:
Riftbound Unit: Hwei, Brooding Painter. When I move, draw 1, then discard 1. Then, do the following based on the discarded card's type:
* Spell — Draw 1.
* Gear — Ready up to 2 runes.
* Unit — Give me +3 [S] this turn.

legality.notes: No specific Standard Constructed ban found in official first-bans announcement as of 2026-03-30.
